ecarx.carext.userprofile

Annotation Type IUserProfile.ActionType


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface IUserProfile.ActionType
    Profile action type
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_ADD
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_REMOVE
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_LOGIN
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_LOGOUT
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_SWITCH
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_APPLY
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_RESET
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_BIND
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_UNBIND
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_UNBIND_RESET
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_FACE_BIND
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_FACE_UNBIND
    IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_FACE_RECOGNIZE
